title: cotula hemisphaerica
intro: Cotula hemisphaerica, also known as round cotula or yellow buttons, is a perennial plant species native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, colds, and flu due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The leaves and flowers of the plant are used in herbal preparations to alleviate symptoms such as sore throats, coughs, and fever, as well as to relieve menstrual cramps and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Cotula hemisphaerica include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
